prompt: I'm getting 'error: undefined symbol: _abort' and about 30 other undefined symbols when trying to build on my M4 Mac running macOS Tahoe. zig build test fails completely. How do I fix this?

assertions.text: Identifies this as Darwin 25+ / macOS Tahoe linker issue
Recommends using a host-built Zig matching .zigversion on PATH
Mentions build/link.zig as the platform linking layer
Suggests zig fmt --check as always-works fallback for verification
Suggests zig fmt --check as always-works fallback
Mentions clearing .zig-cache if stale cache is suspected
Warns against use_lld = true on macOS
